source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Saturated liquid nitrogen at 600 kPa enters a boiler at a rate of 0.008 kg/s and exits as saturated vapor. It then flows into a superheater also at 600 kPa, where it exits at 600 kPa, 280 K. Find the rate of heat transfer in the superheater.
